name: hb_finance_ganache
description: One-click local Ganache chain for HB Finance testing

scripts.chain: ganache --chain.chainId 31337 --server.host 127.0.0.1 --server.port 8545 --wallet.totalAccounts 10 --wallet.defaultBalance 100000 --wallet.mnemonic "test test test test test test test test test test test junk" --database.dbPath ./data
